category_sources: source_facts.description says it applies patches with conflicting changes; official GitHub README/help text says Wiggle applies patches that patch rejects and supports diff, merge, and patch modes.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is wiggle; official GitHub repository and help text use wiggle/Wiggle.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository includes the wiggle.1 man page and README/help text as project documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/neilbrown/wiggle, so repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies patch conflict handling; official GitHub help text lists diff, merge, patch, lines, and words operations.
